commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: speak: Not only will he delude the wretched multitude by counterfeiting the spirit with fire, but he will also make it of use for teaching others. THE MARK OF THE BEAST <a

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: breath: That is, by making himself an image of the beast, he pretended that he gave the spirit of truth to the very people in whom the falsehood was fulfilled.
